text: The gui library contains various utility functions for handling user interfaces.
This library can only be used on the client.
Sets a target callback for generic notification popups
params: Function to be called when a alert message is called

text: Sets the blocking state for the in game menu.
params: The new blocking state for the in game menu.

text: Prints text in the chat gui.
Will not be sent to other players.
Calculates the 720 widget size required to display a text
params: The maximum desired widget width before wrapping (optional) (Defaults to -1)
Should tags be replaced before calculating? (optional) (Defaults to true)
If true the gui is destroyed when closed, otherwise the gui can be reused. (Defaults to false)

text: Create a world icon GUI from a layout file.
params: Path to the layout file (Defaults to "$GAME_DATA/Gui/Layouts/Hud/Hud_WorldIcon.layout")
If true the gui is destroyed when closed, otherwise the gui can be reused. (Defaults to false)
return: The gui interface to the created gui.

text: Displays an alert message at the top of the screen for a set duration.
params: The time in seconds during which the message is shown. Defaults to 4 seconds
If true the message is queued, otherwise it is displayed instantly. Defaults to false

text: Fades the screen back from a fade to black.
params: If true, start the fade out from full black even if there was no fade to black active. (Defaults to false)

text: Exits the current game and returns to the main menu
Can only be used in the Challenge Mode
Returns the current users language setting.
Gets the item resource, group and name for an item icon from a uuid
return: {string, string, string, string, string}	The item resource, group, name, trackingType and shapeType.

text: Returns the set binding for an action as a string
params: If the string should contain hyper text (Defaults to false)

text: Returns the size of the screen.
return: The screen size as width and height.

text: Returns whether the player has an active gui or not
return: guiActive	Whether the player has an active gui or not.

text: Open the garage creation import GUI
Set a text for the character that will be displayed above its head. Only has effect in dev build.
params: If true the previous text will be overwritten. (Defaults to true)

text: Sets a button callback to be called when the button is pressed.
params: Function to be called when button is pressed

text: Sets a callback to be called when an error with the import is met.
params: Function to be called when error is met

text: Set the storage container for the garage creation import gui to use
params: The container import gui should use for materials.

text: Set the binding text displayed at the center.
Set the progress fraction filling the circle icon displayed at the center.
params: The fraction that determines how much of the circle is filled.

text: Fades the screen to black and back after timeout.
params: Seconds until the fade fades back

text: Fades the screen to black, waits for the world to finish loading, then fades back.
First waits until timeout, then holds black until the world is ready or a max timeout is reached.
params: Seconds until the fade starts waiting for the world

text: Converts ticks to a HH:MM:SS string representation.
Translates all localization tags in a text using the current language.
